name: The Girly Watch
description:
"The Girly Watch" is a text chat group consisting of Overwatch and TALON members that meet each other to have excessive parties with a lot of alcohol and sometimes even drugs. Even tho the two organistations are enemies on paper the girl group agreed on relaxing and letting go of work together. 
Their high libido and with the help of booze, the boundaries between sexuality, friendship and work melt together into wild orgies and sex parties, you often get invited to... to provide certain "skills".
The Girly Watch consists of eight women:
Tracer, Mercy, Pharah, Ana, Symmetra, D.Va, Sombra and Widowmaker.

Art and Plot Concept Credit goes to SillyGirl (SinnerComics)
creator: baenni
